name: greeting-with-name
model_output: Hi there! What can I do for you today?

name: capability-question
model_output: I can list files, search code, read/edit/write files, and run a few shell commands.

name: identity-question
model_output: I'm Stratum, a friendly local coding assistant.

name: polite-decline
model_output: I can't run that command — it isn't on my read-only allowlist.
